case_description:
TEAMS:
  - Team A has a team salary of $125,000,000.

PLAYERS:
  - Player A was the 2nd first-round pick of Team A in 2013 NBA draft when he was 20 years old.
  - Player A signed a 4-year contract (annual salary $32,000,000, 5% increase per year) with Team A during 2020 Moratorium Period.
  - Player B was the 5th first-round pick of Team B in 2014 NBA draft when he was 19 years old.
  - Player B signed a 4-year contract (annual salary $30,000,000, 5% increase per year) with Team A during 2022 Moratorium Period.
  - Player C was the 13th first-round pick of Team C in 2017 NBA draft when he was 19 years old.
  - Player C signed a 3-year contract (annual salary $24,000,000, 5% increase per year) with Team B during 2023 Moratorium Period.
  - Player D was the 11th first-round pick of Team D in 2017 NBA draft when he was 21 years old.
  - Player D signed a 3-year contract (annual salary $14,000,000, 5% increase per year) with Team B during 2023 Moratorium Period.

OPERATION UNDER ADJUDICATION: A
  A. Team A trades Player B to Team B for Player C and Player D.
